description: Validate a DiffDock batch-input CSV: required columns present, each row supplies a protein (path or sequence) and a ligand, file paths resolve, and SMILES parse (RDKit, optional).
rules: read-only — inspects the CSV and referenced files, never writes inputs
requires pandas; RDKit is optional (SMILES validation is skipped if RDKit is absent)
validation report (pass/fail + per-row messages) written to record_store
usage: Set INPUT_CSV (path to the batch CSV). Optionally set BASE_DIR (base dir for relative file paths). Output: validation_report.txt.
limitation: Validates structure/paths/SMILES only; it does not check chemistry feasibility or run docking. Without RDKit, SMILES are not chemically validated.
